name: Allain

skills.name: Howling Blade
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills grant Fury, which increases his Physical Pierce and Magical Pierce and grants damage reduction. At max Fury, he recovers Health, and the lower his Health, the more he recovers.

skills.name: Meteor Kill
skills.description: Based on how many stacks of mark he has, deals multi-phase damage in the target direction and launches enemies. He gains marks by hitting enemies with Basic Attacks and his Ultimate.

skills.name: Moonlight Flash
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies. He gains Movement Speed and his next 3 Basic Attacks gain increased Attack Speed.

skills.name: Death at Sunset
skills.description: Leaps toward the targeted enemy hero and becomes untargetable. After a short delay, he lands and deals area damage. For every enemy hero hit, he gains marks and Fury. He also gains a shield based on the number of enemies hit.

skillsZh.name: 劍嘯
skillsZh.description: 亞連可以使用快速雙劍普攻，任意技能普攻命中敵人後，疊加怒氣並提升物理、法術穿透和免傷，疊加一定層數後回復自身生命值，血量愈少，回復愈多。

skillsZh.name: 流星斬
skillsZh.description: 亞連基於印記層數，朝指定方向造成多段傷害並擊飛目標(印記層數可透過普攻和3技能命中獲得)。

skillsZh.name: 逐月閃
skillsZh.description: 亞連朝指定方向位移，造成傷害並減速敵人。並使得亞連獲得移速，下3次普攻獲得額外攻速。

skillsZh.name: 落日斬
skillsZh.description: 亞連跳向目標英雄單位，期間無法鎖定為目標，短暫延遲後下落造成範圍傷害。每命中一個敵方英雄，亞連都會獲得印記層數和怒氣，根據命中敵人的人數獲得護盾。

tips: Build: Overlord's Might, Destiny, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 亞連（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.28%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：強者破軍、名刀・司命、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.change: Increased Basic Attack interval and reduced Ultimate's shield effect.
patchHistory.detail: Allain's continuous Basic Attack and counterattack capabilities with his Ultimate have made him a strong contender in both the Clash Lane and team fights. We are slightly nerfing him to allow other heroes to better compete against him.

patchHistoryZh.change: 增加普攻間隔，並降低大招的護盾效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「亞連持續普攻和透過大招的殘血反打能力，讓他經常能在對抗路和團戰中取得不錯的表現，我們略微削弱他，使其他英雄能夠與他抗衡。」

faqs.question: Is Allain good in current season?
faqs.answer: Allain is Tier A Warrior with 50.28% win rate, 0.97% pick rate, and 0.08% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Allain build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Overlord's Might, Destiny, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Eternity Blade, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Allain?
faqs.answer: Pick Sima Yi, Marco Polo. Strong into Lu Bu, Zhuangzi.

faqsZh.question: 亞連 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 亞連 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.28%、選取 0.97%、禁用 0.08%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 亞連 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：強者破軍、名刀・司命、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、無盡戰刃、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 亞連？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Sima Yi、Marco Polo。亞連 克制 Lu Bu、Zhuangzi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lu Bu, Zhuangzi. Weak into: Sima Yi, Marco Polo.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Lu Bu、Zhuangzi；被克制：Sima Yi、Marco Polo

guide.overview: Allain is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.0% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Allain: Basic Attacks and skills grant Fury, which increases his Physical and Magical Pierce and grants damage reduction.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Blazing Cape, Boots of Fortitude, Doomsday, then complete Sparkforged Dagger, Blood Rage, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Allain's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Meteor Kill → Moonlight Flash → Death at Sunset → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Death at Sunset (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Meteor Kill, and Death at Sunset on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Meteor Kill → Moonlight Flash → Death at Sunset → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Allain is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.0% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.1% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Allain.
comparisons: Allain vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 1.6% more often globally. Choose Allain when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Allain vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Allain has +0.9% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Allain when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Allain excels into Lu Bu, Zhuangzi. Avoid blind picking into Sima Yi, Marco Polo without team peel.
